failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant & "Balneário" & "Camboriú"')) AS rank
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant & "Balneário" & "Camboriú"')
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
